channel.title: Email on Remko's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Email on Remko's Blog

item.title: Google adds IMAP support to GMail
item.description: Google has added imap support to GMail. This means you can use an e-mail client like Outlook (Express) to read your mail but you don’t have to download and store them locally. Read more here. The Storage Limit has been raised to 4 GB (at time of writing 4569 MB)
